sources.name: BRIDGES 2026 official conference site
sources.mvp_use: Confirm Steve Adler as a listed BRIDGES speaker and former Mayor of Austin
caveats: Conference listing does not make Steve Adler the current operational owner of Austin heat response.

sources.name: Heat Disparity by Census Block Groups - Summer 2024
sources.mvp_use: Historical local heat-disparity component; no runtime map or API
caveats: Historical Summer 2024 layer, not current air temperature.
Temperature_Difference is relative to the city average.

sources.name: Austin Public Library Locations
sources.owner: City of Austin / Austin Public Library
sources.mvp_use: Base public indoor facility inventory
caveats: Inventory data do not prove current hours, air-conditioning status, capacity, or event participation.
Join event-time status separately.
sources.local_asset_scope: all 23 official records inspected on research date; normalized, not byte-for-byte raw
sources.runtime_use: selected inventory records already embedded in processed fixture

sources.name: Austin Recreation Centers
sources.owner: City of Austin / Parks and Recreation
sources.mvp_use: Base recreation-center inventory
caveats: Current cooling-center status and hours require event-time verification.
sources.local_asset_scope: all 20 official records inspected on research date; normalized, not byte-for-byte raw
sources.runtime_use: selected inventory records already embedded in processed fixture

sources.name: APR Senior Activity Centers
sources.owner: City of Austin / Parks and Recreation
sources.mvp_use: Public indoor candidate and aging-services resource layer
caveats: Do not assume a senior center is an official cooling center without current confirmation.
sources.runtime_use: candidate/context record only unless operationally verified

sources.name: Austin Pool Schedule and Pool Map
sources.owner: City of Austin / Parks and Recreation
sources.mvp_use: Aquatic cooling amenity layer
caveats: jfqh-bqzu is a map view whose parent tabular dataset is xaxa-886r; use the parent ID for API ingestion.
Pool and splash-pad access is not equivalent to an indoor cooling center.
Weather closures, lifeguard status, entry conditions, and water safety matter.
sources.local_asset_scope: selected pool record only; not a complete pool snapshot
sources.runtime_use: aquatic amenity context; excluded from indoor access

sources.name: Austin Active Emergency Information Hub
sources.mvp_use: Policy and public-reference evidence for facility classes and status categories
caveats: No supported machine-readable operations API was identified.
Do not depend on HTML scraping for the conference demo or production operations.

sources.name: Austin Heat Awareness and Heat Illness Statistics
sources.mvp_use: Dated aggregate situation overview fixture
caveats: Emergency-department counts are preliminary or pre-diagnostic.
No stable machine API was identified.
Never treat aggregate counts as person-level records.
sources.runtime_use: dated context embedded in processed fixture

sources.name: Beating the Heat in Central Texas
sources.mvp_use: Cooling-center, verification, and transportation policy context
caveats: Locations and hours can change; users are directed to official alerts or direct contact.

sources.name: Extreme Heat Preparedness Audit Report
sources.owner: City of Austin Office of the City Auditor
sources.mvp_use: Evidence of responsibility, accountability, funding, and coordination gaps

sources.name: City of Austin Heat Resilience Playbook
sources.mvp_use: Evidence for library/recreation communications and cross-sector champions
caveats: A strategy document is not proof of event-time implementation or funding.

sources.name: Austin-Travis County Heat Emergency Plan
sources.owner: City of Austin and Travis County
sources.mvp_use: Operational actors, communications, 3-1-1, transportation, surveillance, and trigger context
caveats: Confirm the current approved plan and any revisions before a production pilot.

sources.name: CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index
sources.mvp_use: Social-vulnerability component and explanation
caveats: Area-level context, not an individual label.
Use official release documentation for sentinel values and field meanings.
Read FIPS as text and filter Travis County by prefix 48453.
Do not silently substitute a newer release.
sources.runtime_use: precomputed overall percentile embedded in fixture

sources.name: CDC PLACES Census Tract Data
sources.owner: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.mvp_use: Context-only modeled community health measures
caveats: 2025 GIS-friendly wide release with one row per tract.
Model-based estimates, not observed patient counts.
Measure source years can differ within a release.
Excluded from the SafeHeat priority score.
sources.runtime_use: synthetic source-shaped context values embedded in fixture; excluded from score

sources.name: National Weather Service API
sources.mvp_use: Adapter research and future event trigger; not runtime conference data
caveats: Use a bundled synthetic alert for a deterministic conference demo.
Follow forecast URLs returned by the point endpoint; do not hard-code office/grid.
Current responses are volatile and require a descriptive User-Agent.
sources.runtime_use: none in conference app; synthetic warning fixture only

sources.name: CapMetro GTFS
sources.mvp_use: Nearest-stop and route context from a bundled snapshot
caveats: Static schedule data are not a guarantee of a real-time journey.
Do not bundle or parse the full feed in the browser.
Review terms before redistributing a snapshot.

sources.name: Travis County Community Centers
sources.mvp_use: Small manually maintained County cooling-center fixture
caveats: No simple stable open API was identified during the research.
Weekend, holiday, extended-hours, and closure status require verification.
sources.local_asset_scope: six named Family Support Services centers; not a universal count of all County facility programs
sources.runtime_use: none unless event-time status is separately verified

sources.name: Open Now Austin Resource Finder
sources.mvp_use: External resident resource finder and approved offline enrichment candidate; never runtime truth
caveats: Administrative status and published hours do not prove event-time heat-relief availability, staffing, HVAC, capacity, or official activation.
The public item reports no license; do not bundle or redistribute rows without permission/terms review.
Do not expose sensitive service-user information; the layer itself is facility-level.
A separate verifier, verifiedAt, expiresAt, event hours, capacity, and authority class are required before a record counts as verified-open.
sources.runtime_use: none; link or reviewed offline import only
sources.record_count_as_of_research: not captured; use count endpoint at refresh
sources.license_or_terms: GeoHub item observed as No License Provided; obtain reuse/redistribution permission before bundling or publishing rows.

sources.name: Barton Creek Square private facility candidate
sources.address: 2901 S. Capital of Texas Hwy., Austin, TX 78746
sources.mvp_use: Representative private indoor candidate that never counts as coverage without an agreement and current verification
caveats: Public website does not establish a heat-response partnership.
Event-time access, HVAC, seating, water, accessibility, capacity, and publication permission require authorized verification.

sources.name: Lakeline Mall regional private facility candidate
sources.address: 11200 Lakeline Mall Dr., Cedar Park, TX 78613
sources.mvp_use: Optional cross-jurisdiction candidate for a regional scenario
caveats: Public website does not establish a heat-response partnership.
Event-time access, HVAC, seating, water, accessibility, capacity, and publication permission require authorized verification.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap candidate facilities
sources.mvp_use: Seed private/public indoor candidates such as malls, community centers, sports centers, and faith sites
caveats: Completeness and current access vary.
Every record defaults to candidate_unverified.
Open Database License attribution is required.
A mapped building is not an official cooling center.

sources.name: Seasonal Relief Centers and Temperature
sources.mvp_use: Product differentiation and future integration discovery
caveats: Existing map means SafeHeat must not position a heat/facility map as the unmet need.
Confirm authoritative ownership and child-layer contracts before any integration.

sources.name: TDEM Local Shelter & Seasonal Relief Centers
sources.owner: Texas Division of Emergency Management and contributing local/nonprofit partners
sources.refresh_expectation: map not real-time; linked accessibility spreadsheet described as hourly
sources.mvp_use: Cross-check and future approved offline facility/accessibility discovery
caveats: The map explicitly says it is not updated in real time and directs users to call 2-1-1 for latest information.
Do not override Austin/local incident owners with this source.
Resolve the current spreadsheet URL from app configuration; do not hard-code a guessed export URL.
Confirm license and redistribution terms before bundling.

sources.name: 2026 Cooling Sites ArcGIS Experience - Philadelphia false positive
sources.mvp_use: Explicit exclusion to prevent jurisdictional contamination during source refresh
caveats: Generic title can be mistaken for Austin; it is associated with Philadelphia, not Austin.

operational_truth_rules: Unknown or stale facility status never counts as open.
Inventory presence does not establish event participation.
Private candidates require explicit participation and current verification.
Aquatic amenities are not equivalent to indoor cooling.
Area-level vulnerability data must never be used to infer an individual resident's status.
Synthetic operational data must remain visibly labeled.
A fresh verification record does not count as open when currentDemoTime falls outside eventOpenAt/eventCloseAt.
Open Now and TDEM records remain discovery/supporting evidence until separately verified for the operational period.
Jurisdiction must be confirmed before any generically titled ArcGIS cooling dataset is imported.

runtime_policy.source_authority_precedence: authorized event-time owner > Austin incident lead > approved Austin operational feed > direct facility confirmation > approved discovery import > static inventory/planning context
